LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS, INC., YUBA SUTTER DISPOSAL, INC. AND RICHARD C. BURNETT'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS (TRANSFERRED FROM DEPARTMENT 301, PER RECUSAL OF JUDGE BUSCH). ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE MOTION MAY NOT BE PROPERLY MADE UNTIL THE ANSWER IS FILED. SAN FRANCISCO IS A PROPER COURT FOR THE FILING OF THIS ACTION. INSUFFICIENT DECLARATIONS SUPPORTING CHANGE OF VENUE FOR CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES, AND THAT THE ENDS OF JUSTICE WILL BE SERVED BY THE CHANGE. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (NOTICE IS WAIVED BY COUNSEL.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Change Of Venue And Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS, INCORPORATED AND YUBA SUTTER DISPOSAL, INCORPORATED'S MOTION For Change Of Venue And Request Sanctions IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 302 PER JUDGE BUSCH RECUSAL. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)

Defendants Norcal Waste Systems, Inc., Yuba Sutter Disposal, Inc. And Richard C. Burnett'S Motion For Change Of Venue And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Norcal Waste Systems, Inc., Yuba Sutter Disposal, Inc. and Richard C. Burnett's Motion for Change of Venue and Request for sanctions (transferred from Department 301, per recusal of Judge Busch). Appearances: Terrence. J. Keeley, Law Offices of Terrence J. Keeley, (530) 525-4245, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Jim Moore, Esq. and Judith A. Whitehouse, Esq. of Bullivant Houser Bailey PC (415) 352-2724, appearing for Defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for change of venue is denied, without prejudice. The motion may not be properly made until the answer is filed. San Francisco is a proper court for the filing of this action. Insufficient declarations supporting change of venue for convenience of witnesses, and that the ends of justice will be served by the change. All Requests for sanctions denied. Order signed in open Court. (Notice is waived by counsel.)(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
